title: Basit Hesap Makinesi
subtitle: Toplama, cikarma, carpma, bolme islemleri.
code:
def calculate(a, b, op)
  case op
  when "+" then a + b
  when "-" then a - b
  when "*" then a * b
  when "/"
    if b == 0
      puts "Hata: Sifira bolme!"
      nil
    else
      a / b
    end
  else
    puts "Gecersiz islem: #{op}"
    nil
  end
end

x, y = 15.0, 4.0

puts "x = #{x}, y = #{y}"
puts "x + y = #{calculate(x, y, "+")}"
puts "x - y = #{calculate(x, y, "-")}"
puts "x * y = #{calculate(x, y, "*")}"
puts "x / y = #{calculate(x, y, "/")}"

puts "\nSifira bolme testi:"
calculate(10, 0, "/")

# Yuzde hesaplama
total = 250
discount = 15
final_price = total - (total * discount / 100.0)
puts "\n#{total} TL'nin %#{discount} indirimli hali: #{final_price} TL"
